item.title: Afghan asylum seeker guilty of raping girl, 12
item.description: The 12-year-old suffered "extremely horrific sexual offences" in the Nuneaton attack, police say.

item.title: Man guilty of murdering partner's five-month-old baby
item.description: Jensen-Lee Dougal was described as a “happy baby” but died after suffering “catastrophic brain injuries”.

item.title: Dodds and Mouat react to second Olympic heartbreak
item.description: Team GB's Jen Dodds and Bruce Mouat say their loss "hurts" after being edged out by hosts Italy in the curling mixed doubles bronze medal game - echoi...

item.title: Fan who gave Robbie Williams number as teen joins him on stage
item.description: The Wolverhampton teacher who appeared in a Netflix documentary is welcomed on stage by the star.

item.title: Six key questions about Keir Starmer's future
item.description: There is no doubting the peril the prime minister was in, but while Labour MPs have decided to stick with him, his future is far from certain.
